summary: Current estimate PDF is structurally sourced but visually rendered as plain text lines in a PDF stream.

gaps.current: EstimatePdfViewModel is flattened into text lines with pipe separators.
gaps.target: Structured document template with real table layout primitives.

gaps.current: No estimate-specific document visual contract exists for header, metadata, table, tax/source, footer.
gaps.target: EstimateDocumentViewModel contract rendered by shared document primitives.

gaps.current: Proposal/request PDF HTML templates contain real table primitives while estimate/request consumer flow uses text PDF stream.
gaps.target: Shared document layout primitives with separate document semantics.

gaps.current: Web/Android viewers can open current binary but cannot compensate for weak document layout.
gaps.target: Renderer produces layout quality before viewer handoff.
